## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Linked Issue

Closes #

## Change Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Docs update
- [ ] Infrastructure / CI change

## Validation

List the commands or checks you ran.

- [ ] Local script validation
- [ ] Terraform validation/plan (if applicable)
- [ ] Workflow validation (if applicable)

## Deployment / Rollback Notes

If this affects deployments, include impact and rollback steps.

## Checklist

- [ ] I used the appropriate issue template first
- [ ] I kept the change scoped and documented
- [ ] I updated related docs/runbooks as needed
